sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 10), (2, 20), (3, NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 10 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, SUM(value) AS total_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
